Particle Simulation  
Neko Henerson & Lukas Wilson

Description:  
Small scale particle simulation where small circles (particles) can be spawned that   
adhere to gravity and bounce off each other and the walls.

Why it’s cool:  
	This involves complicated math to simulate physics and movement. We will have to use   
creative solutions to do this under the constraints of kilt graphics.

Initial Construct:  
	We plan to first construct a simulation where one circle, of definite color and size, is   
spawned and can bounce around to set physics variables.
